description: API-to-UI contract mappings. For each entity: proto fields → converter → model fields → UI components. Enables agents to understand how backend data becomes visible UI.

utilities: parseOrderStatusFromProto — determines active status (main vs draft) and mid-flight changes

fieldMappings.ui: Table: title column subtitle, Detail: breadcrumb
Table: amount column, Detail: Cost section
Table: lineItems column (count+link), Detail: Line Items section
Table: status column, Detail: status badge
Detail: stored, not displayed in list

utilities: isImageCreative, isVideoCreative, isNativeImageCreative, isNativeVideoCreative — type guards

fieldMappings.ui: Form: single select, used by getMoneyRenderer

converter.note: Proto is 'Product' but model is 'Brand' — naming mismatch is intentional

fieldMappings.ui: Form: text input (max 80), List: title column
Form: ad unit selector, Detail: ad unit list
Form: KV targeting field, Detail: KV display

utilities: convertPublisherTargetSettingBackward / convertPublisherTargetSettingForward — target settings with surcharge

fieldMappings.ui: Table: inventory subtitle (skippable offset), Form: MCFormSkippableVideoInput

utilities: targetingConditionConverter — converts targeting_condition proto ↔ TargetingCondition model
getOrderKindsFromOrderKindVisibility / getOrderKindVisibilityFromOrderKinds — order kind enum mapping

fieldMappings.ui: Table: title column (searchable), Form: text input
Table: settings column (chip display), Form: targeting condition fields

notes.adOpsFlow: AdOps users select an ad account via MCAdvertiserSelector before seeing audience targets. The adAccountId is passed as a URL search param.
notes.deletionDialog: MCAudienceTargetDeletionDialog is rendered in the list container for delete confirmation.

Report.description: Data visualization/analytics page with historical and reach report types. Not a CRUD entity — consumes analytics API and renders configurable tables/charts.

clientTypes.determination: Derived from user role: AdOps/MolocoStaff → publisher, AD_ACCOUNT_OWNER → media-rep, AD_ACCOUNT_VIEWER → advertiser

historicalReport.dimensions: MEAnalyticsDetailDimension[] — breakdown dimensions (basic, notDirect, time, disabled)
historicalReport.caching: localStorage keyed by workplaceId + userId + reportType

tableConfiguration.sorting: Server-side via MIAnalyticsDetailOrderByFilter, mapped by HistoricalReportColumnToOrderByFilter

utilities: getHistoricalReportCellRenderer — cell renderer by column key
getHistoricalReportFilterParams — build filter params from config

AdPacingDashboard.description: Real-time ad pacing monitoring dashboard. Displays campaign spend vs budget pacing with auto-refresh. Not a CRUD entity — consumes analytics data and campaign/order info.

parameters.dateRange: { start: Date, end: Date } from configuration state

components.configurator: MCAdPacingDashboardConfigurator — date range and filter settings
components.table: MCAdPacingDashboardTable — main data table with pacing info
components.layout: MCContentLayout — page wrapper with title and breadcrumb

navigation.campaignLink: Navigates to campaign detail via generatePathForRoute(MERouteKey.*, params)

UserSetting.description: User settings page with tabbed sub-sections: My Info (detail/edit), MFA (2FA TOTP setup), and API Access (key management). Not a standard CRUD entity — manages current user's own profile and security settings.

userInfo.description: View and edit current user profile (email, name)

states.authFactorId: First activated factor ID (only one allowed)

actions.description: Sends TOTP setup email to user

apiAccess.description: API key generation, viewing, resetting, and deactivation

states.APIKeyId: Matched by user_id from listAPIKeys response
states.isAPIKeyCreated: Boolean — whether user has an active API key
states.APIkey: Transient — shown only after create/reset, not persisted in UI state

actions.description: Creates new API key, displays original_key

routing.pattern: Uses <Navigate> for base route, <Outlet> for sub-routes

AdAccountAndBrandManagement.description: Admin settings page for managing ad accounts and brands within a workplace, with tabbed sub-sections for ad account settings, ad account users, brands, and brand apps.

routing.pattern: Uses <Navigate> for base route redirect, <Outlet> for sub-route rendering

CreativeReview.description: Workflow page for reviewing, approving, and rejecting creatives across workplaces, with tabs for order-specific and all creative reviews.

data_source.returns: { query: { isFetching, error }, data: creativeWithReviews, functions: { approveCreative, rejectCreative, rollbackCreative, bulkApproveCreatives, bulkRejectCreatives } }

tabs.description: Creatives included in orders only (filtered by referrerInfo.isUsingInOrder)

CustomTarget.description: Custom targeting rules management, rendered as an embedded MCP (Moloco Cloud Platform) iframe with token-based authentication and idle timeout refresh.
CustomTarget.idleTimeout: 30 minutes — refreshes token on activity resume

CustomerSet.description: Customer segmentation management (user lists) with CRUD operations, supporting both publisher-level and ad-account-level customer sets with tabbed navigation.

data_source.routing: MERouteKey.USER_LIST_MAIN with publisher and ad-account sub-routes

LookerDashboard.description: Embedded Looker analytics dashboard with role-based views — AdOps users see a direct Looker iframe, while Media Rep users get a tabbed dashboard with sub-routes.

Publisher.description: Publisher management with list view (available/archived tabs), creation, and detail pages, allowing workplace operators to manage publisher entities.

PublisherCreativeReview.description: Publisher-side creative review page for reviewing video ad creatives, displaying review status, impression counts, and video asset details. Currently uses mock data (TODO: integrate real API).

data_source.hook: MOCK_REVIEWS (static mock data — real hook TBD)

TrackingLink.description: Tracking URL management with full CRUD operations, advertiser-scoped filtering, verification status tracking, and test history — used for attribution and conversion tracking.

WorkplacePresets.description: Workspace configuration presets management with tabbed sections for key-value pairs, advertisers, custom presets, and other settings — configures default values and options for the workplace.

data_source.routing: MERouteKey.OMS_WORKPLACE_PRESETS with sub-routes for each preset type

routing.pattern: Uses <Navigate> for base route redirect, <Outlet> for sub-route rendering

WorkplaceSetting.description: Workspace-level settings management with tabbed sections for workplace user management and API access configuration.

routing.pattern: Uses <Navigate> for base route redirect, <Outlet> for sub-route rendering

commonPatterns.listResponse: All list endpoints return { {entity_plural}?: Array<Proto>, parent_infos?: Array<ParentInfoProto> }
commonPatterns.parentInfo: Contains ad_account (id, title) and product (id, title) for display in list tables
commonPatterns.microCurrency: All monetary values are in micro units (×1,000,000). Use getMicroToNormalValue() for display.
commonPatterns.timestampFormat: ISO 8601 string. Use DateFunc.format(ts, { timezone }) for display.
commonPatterns.enumMapping: Use getEnumValueFromProto(EnumType, protoValue, defaultValue) for safe enum conversion.
commonPatterns.converterNaming: backward = proto → model, forward = model → proto
commonPatterns.hookPattern: use{Entity}s() returns { query, data: Model[], dataMap } for list hooks

shared.getDateStringRenderer: Formats timestamp with timezone. Args: { timezone }
shared.getDeletionDateStringRenderer: Shows countdown to deletion. Args: { timezone, maxValidDurationInDay }
shared.getMoneyRenderer: Formats micro currency. Args: (currency, { showExactValue, align })
shared.getNumberRenderer: Numeric display with optional click handler
shared.getTimeIntervalRenderer: Date range display. Args: { timezone, format }

orderSpecific.getOrderStatusRenderer: Order status badge with mid-flight change indicator
orderSpecific.getOrderLineItemSettingsRenderer: Line item count with clickable link

auctionOrderSpecific.getAuctionOrderBudgetRenderer: Total budget with daily capping tooltip

creativeSpecific.getCreativeReviewStatusRendererForCreati: Review status with denied reason dialog
